film.title: Rashtra Kavach Om
film.overview: Om, a special forces para commando officer, loses his memory while fighting enemies. After recovering from amnesia, Om is on a mission to save the nation from terrorists. As he fights the challenges the mission presents, he learns a shocking truth about his life.

dialogues.dialogue: KAVACH, India's pride. –I hope that today the wait and the conflict is over. and we get our safety back. What's the status, Rohit? –Jai Hind, Sir. –Sir, 55 seconds to go.
dialogues.cause_raw: KAVACH presumably a project or mission

dialogues.dialogue: Had I known this before, maybe the traitor would've been jailed today, and the pride of this country, to its motherland. I can terminate you on this point. I thought you broke my trust two months ago.

Every time I will make it straight, it will remind me that I am not Rishi but Om now. It is a proud moment for any father, to hug and see his son being well grown up. She hasn't slept all night, waiting for you, Go. –Meet her.
My eyes may or may not remain open. But your dreams will always last. Your head will be held high in pride. That'll be the dawn for me. If I die for you, I'd be fortunate.
Jai's death shattered me completely. But today, I feel proud to see, that a son has his father at gunpoint, for his nation. –Think over it. How can your father be the traitor?
dialogues.cause_raw: son standing up for his nation

dialogues.dialogue: You sold the Kavach. –Like your story, even this Kavach is fake. Real Kavach is over there. Nation's pride will return today but not the traitor. Because I had promised my mother. –That if Dev Rathore is found traitor, there will be no one to perform his last rites.
